## Entry Type

<!-- Select one -->
- [ ] Markdown entry (`corpus/entries/`)
- [ ] Entity (`corpus/entities/`)
- [ ] Faction (`corpus/factions/`)
- [ ] Ritual (`corpus/rituals/`)
- [ ] Timeline event (`corpus/timelines/`)

## Epistemic Status

<!-- Select one — see SAFETY.md for definitions -->
- [ ] `documented` — supported by verifiable sources (citations required)
- [ ] `contested` — evidence exists but disputed
- [ ] `speculative` — reasoned extrapolation
- [ ] `fiction` — narrative/lore framing, not factual

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No actionable exploit step-by-step instructions
- [ ] Security content (if any) is defensive-focused only
